case_title: WELLS FARGO INVESTMENTS LLC VS. JAMAL ABDUL-KABIR et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE AND ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF RECEIPT, SIGNED FEB-18-2013 RE: PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD; AMENDED NOTICE OF HEARING PETITIONER WELLS FARGO INVESTMENTS, LLC; MEMO P/A; DECLARATION OF GORDON C YOUNG FILED BY PETITIONER WELLS FARGO INVESTMENTS LLC

NOTICE AND ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF RECEIPT RE: PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD; NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD; MEMO P/A; DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER WELLS FARGO INVESTMENTS LLC

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER WELLS FARGO INVESTMENTS LLC'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NOTICE AND ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF RECEIPT FORMS FOR EACH RESPONDENT DO NOT COMPLY WITH CCP 415.30(B). THE "SIGNATURE OF PERSON ACKNOWLEDGING RECEIPT" ON EACH FORM DOES NOT INCLUDE THAT PERSON'S TITLE, AND ACKNOWLEDGMENT IS MADE ON BEHALF OF ANOTHER PERSON. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING WHICH WAS NOT CONTESTED. PETITIONER WELLS FARGO INVESTMENTS LLC'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. ON FEBRUARY 22, 2013, RESPONDENTS KABIR AND HANSON FILED THEIR STATEMENT OF NON-OPPOSITION TO THE PETITION. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

calendar.matters:
(Amended) Notice Of Hearing On Petitioner Wells Fargo Investments, Llc'S Petition To Confirm Arb Award
Off Calendar Mar-14-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Juliette B. McCullough, Esq. of Keesal Young & Logan, Tel. 415.38.6000, for petitioner and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. PETITIONER WELLS FARGO INVESTMENTS LLC's Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is Granted. On February 22, 2013, Respondents Kabir and Hanson filed their statement of non-opposition to the petition. Order and Judgment signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Ntc Of Hrg On Petition To Confirm Arb Award
Off Calendar Feb-01-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER WELLS FARGO INVESTMENTS LLC's Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is Denied without prejudice. Notice and Acknowledgment of Receipt forms for each respondent do not comply with CCP 415.30(b). The "signature of person acknowledging receipt" on each form does not include that person's title, and acknowledgment is made on behalf of another person. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
